# AgentK

> Real-time Reddit keyword monitoring and alert tool. AgentK scans any subreddit every 5 minutes and fires instant Telegram and Discord alerts the moment a post matching your keywords goes live.

## What AgentK Does

AgentK is a Reddit monitoring service that tracks keywords across subreddits 24/7. When a matching post is detected, users receive an immediate push notification via Telegram or Discord typically within 6 minutes of the post being published.

## Key Features

- **Real-time Reddit monitoring**: Scans subreddits every 5 minutes, continuously
- **Instant alerts**: Telegram and Discord notifications with post title, author, upvotes, comments, and direct link
- **50 keywords** per account, **5 subreddits** per account
- **Filters**: Minimum upvotes, minimum comments, minimum author karma, hourly alert cap
- **Completely free**: No credit card, no usage limits, no trial period

## Use Cases

- Founders monitoring competitor brand mentions on Reddit
- Sales teams catching "looking for a tool like X" buying-intent posts
- Marketers tracking brand sentiment and product discussions
- Recruiters finding job-seeking posts in professional subreddits
- Investors tracking industry trends and startup discussions
- Community managers staying on top of their product name

## How It Works

1. Create a free account (Google OAuth or email/password)
2. Enter keywords to track (e.g., "Reddit monitoring", "Telegram alerts", competitor names)
3. Select subreddits to watch (e.g., r/entrepreneur, r/SaaS, r/startups)
4. Connect Telegram bot or Discord server
5. AgentK monitors 24/7 and delivers alerts instantly

## Pricing

Free forever. No paid plans. No credit card required.

## Company

- Website: https://tryagentk.com
- Support: support@agentk.io
- Privacy Policy: https://tryagentk.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://tryagentk.com/terms

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js (React), deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Convex (real-time database and serverless functions)
- Auth: Convex Auth with Google OAuth and email/password
- Notifications: Telegram Bot API, Discord Bot API
- Data source: Reddit public API
